text:
Team Ireland's boxers are fighting for gold at the Paris Olympic Games, and Monkstown Boxing Club's Jack Marley is back in the ring this evening.

RTÉjr caught up with Jack for some hard-hitting questions!! Press play to see his Quick Q&A where he tells us he is living the dream. And he reveals his first ever concert...

Get Paris 2024updates from RTÉ Sportand tune in to RTÉ2 and RTÉ Player.

FollowRTÉjr on InstaandTikTokfor more fun social clips with Team Ireland athletes!



And, when you are tuning in to RTÉ's boxing coverage, you might hear some new words and phrases. So, we asked Jack tells us whats what in the ring.

Watch the 2024 Olympic Games with 14 hours of televised action on RTÉ2 and RTÉ Player each day.

Listen to extensive radio coverage on RTÉ Radio 1 and 2fm's Game On and follow each moment from Paris on RTÉ.ie, the RTÉ News app and all RTÉ digital platforms. Listen to the daily RTÉ Sport Olympics Podcast.

title: Monkstown's Olympic Boxer Jack Marley is living the dream!
description: Team Ireland Boxer Jack Marley explains his boxing stance and tells us how he is living the dream at Paris 2024.
